    let s := (Finset.univ.filter (λ k, c k = c j)).sort (· < ·)
    if j = s[0] then s[1] else if j = s[1] then s[0] else if j = s[2] then s[3] else s[2]

    intro j; let s := (Finset.univ.filter (λ k, c k = c j)).sort (· < ·)
    have hli : s.length = 4 := by rw [List.length_sort, Finset.card_filter, h]
    have hnd : s.Nodup := (Finset.univ.filter (λ k, c k = c j)).sort_nodup (· < ·)
    simp [g]; split_ifs <;> simp_all [List.nodup_iff_nthLe_inj, hli] <;> ((try apply List.get_mem); (try intro h'; rw [h'] at *; simp at *))
  let G : SimpleGraph (Fin (4 * n)) := SimpleGraph.fromRel (λ j k ↦ (k = f j ∨ k = g j) ∧ j ≠ k)
  have hb : G.IsBipartite := by
    rw [SimpleGraph.isBipartite_iff_no_odd_cycle]; intro v l hc
    have h_alt {i} (hi : i < l.length) : (l.vLog (i+1) = f (l.vLog i) ∨ l.vLog (i+1) = g (l.vLog i)) ∧ l.vLog (i+1) ≠ l.vLog i := by
      have := l.adj_vLog hi; simpa [G, SimpleGraph.fromRel_adj] using this
    have h_diff {i} (hi : i + 1 < l.length) : l.vLog (i+1) = f (l.vLog i) ↔ l.vLog (i+2) = g (l.vLog (i+1)) := by
      have h1 := h_alt hi.step; have h2 := h_alt (by omega);
      constructor <;> intro h <;> (cases h1.1 <;> cases h2.1 <;> simp_all; try omega);
      all_goals (intro; subst_vars; have := l.nodup; rw [List.nodup_iff_nthLe_inj] at this; exact (this i (i+2) (by omega) (by omega) (by simp)).elim)
    have : Even l.length := by
      let l_f := (List.range l.length).filter (λ i ↦ l.vLog ((i+1) % l.length) = f (l.vLog (i % l.length)))
      let l_g := (List.range l.length).filter (λ i ↦ l.vLog ((i+1) % l.length) = g (l.vLog (i % l.length)))
      sorry
    exact this.not_odd hc.odd_length

      have := hcolor this; simp [S]; omega
    simp [hfS]; rw [← Finset.sum_map S ⟨f, λ _ _ ↦ by simp [f]; omega⟩, Finset.sum_add_distrib]
    have : S.card = 2 * n := by
      have : Finset.univ = S ∪ S.map ⟨f, λ _ _ ↦ by simp [f]; omega⟩ := by ext j; simp [hfS]; constructor <;> intro; tauto; tauto
      have : 4 * n = 2 * S.card := by rw [← Finset.card_univ, this, Finset.card_union]; simp [Finset.disjoint_left, hfS]
      omega
    simp [f]; omega
  · intro i; let s := (Finset.univ.filter (λ k, c k = i)).sort (· < ·)
    have hli : s.length = 4 := by rw [List.length_sort, Finset.card_filter, h]
    have hgS : ∀ j, j ∈ S ↔ g j ∉ S := by
      intro j; have : G.Adj j (g j) := by simp [G, g, SimpleGraph.fromRel_adj, hg]
      have := hcolor this; simp [S]; omega
    have : {j ∈ S | c j = i} = ({s[0], s[1], s[2], s[3]} : Finset _).filter (· ∈ S) := by
      ext j; simp; constructor <;> intro hj
      · have : j ∈ (Finset.univ.filter (λ k, c k = i)) := by simp [hj.2]
        rw [← Finset.mem_sort, ← List.mem_iff_get, hli] at this; exact ⟨this, hj.1⟩
      · have : j ∈ (Finset.univ.filter (λ k, c k = i)) := by rw [← Finset.mem_sort]; exact List.get_mem _ _ _
        simp at this; exact ⟨hj.2, this⟩
    rw [this, Finset.filter_insert, Finset.filter_insert, Finset.filter_insert, Finset.filter_singleton]
    have hg0 : g s[0] = s[1] := by simp [g]; split_ifs <;> omega

  let f (i : Fin n) : Finset (Fin (2 * n)) := Finset.univ.filter fun k => (({⟨2 * k.1, by omega⟩, ⟨2 * k.1 + 1, by omega⟩} : Finset (Fin (4 * n))) ∩ {x | c x = i}).Nonempty

let pairs : Finset (Finset (Fin (4 * n))) :=
    Finset.univ.image (λ i : Fin (2 * n) => {⟨i, by omega⟩, ⟨4 * n - 1 - i, by omega⟩})
  have h_pairs : ∀ p ∈ pairs, p.card = 2 := by
    simp [pairs]; intro i; apply Finset.card_pair; omega
  let V := Fin n
  let E := Fin (2 * n)
  let end_pts (j : E) : V × V := (c ⟨j, by omega⟩, c ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩)
  let G_edges : Multigraph V := Multigraph.ofFinset E (λ j => {end_pts j.1, end_pts j.2})
  have h_reg : ∀ v : V, (Finset.univ.filter (λ j : E => (end_pts j).1 = v)).card +
      (Finset.univ.filter (λ j : E => (end_pts j).2 = v)).card = 4 := by
    intro i; let f (j : Fin (4 * n)) := c j = i
    have h1 : (Finset.univ.filter f).card = 4 := h i
    have h2 : Finset.univ.filter f = (Finset.univ.filter (λ j : E => c ⟨j, by omega⟩ = i)) ∪
      (Finset.univ.filter (λ j : E => c ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩ = i)) := by
      ext x; simp [f]; constructor
      · intro hx; rw [hx]; cases' em (x < 2 * n) with hlt hge
        · left; exact ⟨⟨x, hlt⟩, rfl⟩
        · right; refine ⟨⟨4 * n - 1 - x, by omega⟩, by simp; omega⟩
      · rintro (⟨j, rfl⟩ | ⟨j, rfl⟩) <;> rfl
    rw [h2] at h1; rw [Finset.card_union_eq_card_add_card] at h1
    · exact h1
    · rw [Finset.disjoint_left]; rintro x ⟨j, rfl⟩ ⟨k, rfl⟩; omega
  obtain ⟨J, hJ⟩ := exists_two_factor_of_four_regular_multigraph end_pts h_reg
  let S : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) := J.biUnion (λ j => {⟨j, by omega⟩, ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩})
  use S
  constructor
  · have hS : ∀ j ∈ J, (⟨j, by omega⟩ : Fin (4 * n)) + 1 + (⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩ + 1) = 4 * n + 1 := by
      intros; simp; omega
    have hSc : ∀ j ∉ J, (⟨j, by omega⟩ : Fin (4 * n)) + 1 + (⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩ + 1) = 4 * n + 1 := by
      intros; simp; omega
    rw [← Finset.sum_biUnion (by simp [Finset.disjoint_left]; intros; omega),
        ← Finset.sum_biUnion (by simp [Finset.disjoint_left]; intros; omega)]
    · simp_rw [hS, hSc]; simp [J, card_compl]; omega
  · intro i; rw [← hJ i]; simp [S, Finset.filter_biUnion]; apply Finset.card_congr (λ j _ => j)
    · simp; intros j hj; cases' em (c ⟨j, by omega⟩ = i) <;> cases' em (c ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩ = i) <;> simp [*]
    · simp; intros; rfl
    · simp; intros j hj _ hji; cases' em (c ⟨j, by omega⟩ = i) <;> cases' em (c ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩ = i) <;> simp [*]
    · intros j hj; simp; cases' em (c ⟨j, by omega⟩ = i) with h1 h1 <;> cases' em (c ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩ = i) with h2 h2 <;> simp [*]
where exists_two_factor_of_four_regular_multigraph {V E : Type*} [Fintype V] [Fintype E] [DecidableEq V] [DecidableEq E]
  (ends : E → V × V) (h : ∀ v : V, (Finset.univ.filter (λ j => (ends j).1 = v)).card + (Finset.univ.filter (λ j => (ends j).2 = v)).card = 4) :
  ∃ J : Finset E, J.card = Fintype.card V ∧ ∀ v : V, (J.filter (λ j => (ends j).1 = v)).card + (J.filter (λ j => (ends j).2 = v)).card = 2 := sorry

simp [S, sum_biUnion, sum_pair, (by omega : (i : ℕ) ≠ 4 * n - 1 - i), card_univ, mul_comm]
  rw [this, ←this, ←sum_add_sum_compl S, sum_univ_fin_add_one, mul_assoc]; omega

let f : Fin (4 * n) ≃ Fin (4 * n) := Fin.equivComplAntitone (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin (4 * n)))
  let p (i : Fin n) := (Finset.univ.filter (fun j => c j = i)).sort (· ≤ ·)
  let e (j : Fin (4 * n)) : Fin (4 * n) :=
    let i := c j
    let l := p i
    let idx := l.indexOf j (by simp)
    l.get (if idx % 2 = 0 then ⟨idx + 1, by (have := l.nodup.2; linarith [idx.2])⟩ else ⟨idx - 1, by linarith⟩)
  let graph : SimpleGraph (Fin (4 * n)) :=
    SimpleGraph.fromEdgeSet { {j, f j} | j : Fin (4 * n) } ⊔ SimpleGraph.fromEdgeSet { {j, e j} | j : Fin (4 * n) }
  have : ∀ j, f (f j) = j := fun j => by simp [f]
  have : ∀ j, e (e j) = j := fun j => by intro j; dsimp [e]; split_ifs <;> (simp [*]; split_ifs <;> try (rename_i h1 h2; simp at h2; contradiction); rfl)
  have : ∀ j, f j ≠ j := fun j => by simp [f, Fin.ext_iff]; linarith
  have : ∀ j, e j ≠ j := fun j => by intro j; dsimp [e]; split_ifs <;> (simp [Fin.ext_iff]; linarith)
  have : SimpleGraph.IsRegularOfDegree graph 2 := sorry
  obtain ⟨S, hS⟩ : ∃ S : Finset (Fin (4 * n)), ∀ j, (j ∈ S ↔ f j ∉ S) ∧ (j ∈ S ↔ e j ∉ S) := sorry
  use S
  have h_sum : ∑ j ∈ S, ((j : ℕ) + 1) = n * (4 * n + 1) := by
    have : ∑ j ∈ S, ((j : ℕ) + 1 + ((f j : ℕ) + 1)) = ∑ j ∈ S, (4 * n + 1) := by
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro j hj; simp [f]; linarith
    rw [←this, Finset.sum_add_distrib]
    have : (S.image f) = Sᶜ := by ext j; simp [hS]; exact ⟨fun ⟨x, hx, hxf⟩ => by rwa [←hxf], fun hj => ⟨f j, by rwa [hS], by simp [f]⟩⟩
    rw [←Finset.sum_image (fun x y hxy => by simp [f] at hxy; exact hxy), this, Nat.sum_range_id_coe]
    simp [Finset.card_compl, mul_comm, ←Nat.mul_div_assoc]
    sorry
  constructor
  · rw [h_sum, ←h_sum, Finset.sum_add_sum_compl]
    simp [Nat.sum_range_id_coe, Nat.mul_div_cancel_left, mul_comm]
  · intro i; have := h i; rw [←Finset.card_filter]; apply (Nat.mul_right_inj (show 2 > 0 by linarith)).1
    have : ∀ j, (c j = i ↔ c (e j) = i) := fun j => by dsimp [e]; split_ifs <;> (apply (p i).mem_get); rfl
    have : (Finset.univ.filter (fun j => c j = i)) = (S.filter (fun j => c j = i)) ∪ (S.filter (fun j => c (e j) = i)).image e := by sorry
    sorry

let pairs : Finset (Fin (2 * n)) := Finset.univ
  let f (k : Fin (2 * n)) : (Fin n × Fin n) := (c ⟨2 * k, by omega⟩, c ⟨2 * k + 1, by omega⟩)
  have deg (v : Fin n) : (pairs.filter (f ·.1 = v)).card + (pairs.filter (f ·.2 = v)).card = 4 := by
    have h1 : (pairs.filter (f ·.1 = v)).card = #{k | c ⟨2 * k, by omega⟩ = v} := rfl
    have h2 : (pairs.filter (f ·.2 = v)).card = #{k | c ⟨2 * k + 1, by omega⟩ = v} := rfl
    rw [h1, h2, ← Finset.card_union, ← h v]
    · apply congr_arg; ext j; simp [Fin.ext_iff]
      intro; constructor; · rintro rfl; use j.1 / 2; simp [Nat.div_two_mul_two_add_one_of_odd, Nat.mul_div_right]
      rintro ⟨k, (rfl | rfl)⟩; rfl; rfl
    · rw [Finset.disjoint_left]; rintro k hk1 hk2; simp at hk1 hk2; omega
  let G := (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin (2 * n)))
  let S_preds := {o : Fin (2 * n) → Bool | ∀ v, (G.filter (λ k => (f k).1 = v ∧ !o k)).card + (G.filter (λ k => (f k).2 = v ∧ o k)).card = 2}
  have ⟨o, ho⟩ : S_preds.Nonempty := by
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n' ih
    cases' n' with n'
    · use λ _; exact (by simp; rintro ⟨i, hi⟩; exact hi.elim)
    let V := Fin (n' + 1)
    let edges := Finset.univ : Finset (Fin (2 * (n' + 1)))
    let deg_in (v : V) (o' : Fin (2 * (n' + 1)) → Bool) := (edges.filter (λ k => (f k).2 = v ∧ o' k)).card
    let deg_out (v : V) (o' : Fin (2 * (n' + 1)) → Bool) := (edges.filter (λ k => (f k).1 = v ∧ !o' k)).card
    let curr_deg (v : V) (edges' : Finset (Fin (2 * (n' + 1)))) := (edges'.filter ((f ·).1 = v)).card + (edges'.filter ((f ·).2 = v)).card
    have : ∀ v, Even (curr_deg v edges) := by simp [curr_deg, deg]; intro; use 2
    obtain ⟨circuit, h_circuit⟩ := (by
      let v0 : V := 0; let rec find_path (v : V) (visited : Finset (Fin (2 * (n' + 1)))) : List (Fin (2 * (n' + 1))) :=
        match (edges.filter (λ k => k ∉ visited ∧ ((f k).1 = v ∨ (f k).2 = v))).min with
        | some k => k :: find_path (if (f k).1 = v then (f k).2 else (f k).1) (visited.insert k)
        | none => []
      exact ⟨find_path v0 ∅, sorry⟩ : ∃ L : List (Fin (2 * (n' + 1))), sorry)
    sorry
  let S := G.image (λ k => if o k then (⟨2 * k + 1, by omega⟩ : Fin (4 * n)) else ⟨2 * k, by omega⟩)
  use S; constructor
  · rw [← sub_eq_zero, Finset.sum_sub_sum_compl, Finset.sum_univ]
    simp [S, Finset.sum_image (λ k1 k2 h => by simp [Fin.ext_iff] at h; omega)]
    apply (Finset.sum_congr rfl (λ k _ => ?_)).trans (Finset.sum_eq_zero (λ v _ => ?_))
    · split_ifs <;> simp [Fin.ext_iff]
    · let diff := (λ k => if o k then (1 : ℤ) else -1); change ∑ k, diff k = 0
      rw [← Finset.sum_image (λ k1 k2 h => by simp [Fin.ext_iff] at h; omega)]
      simp [Finset.sum_sigma, ← Finset.sum_congr]
      rw [← Finset.sum_univ_sum (λ v => (G.filter (λ k => (f k).2 = v ∧ o k)).card - (G.filter (λ k => (f k).1 = v ∧ !o k)).card)]
      simp; intro v; rw [ho v]; omega
  · intro i; rw [← ho i]; apply congr_arg; ext j; simp [S, Fin.ext_iff]
    constructor; · rintro ⟨k, hk, rfl⟩; split_ifs at hk <;> simp at hk ⊢ <;> (try constructor) <;> assumption
    · rintro ⟨rfl, hji⟩; use j.1 / 2; simp [Nat.div_two_mul_two_add_one_of_odd, Nat.mul_div_right]
      cases' (Nat.even_or_odd j.1) with he ho <;> simp [he, ho] at hji ⊢ <;> assumption

let pairs : Finset (Fin (2 * n)) := Finset.univ
  let f (k : Fin (2 * n)) : Fin (4 * n) × Fin (4 * n) :=
    (⟨k, by omega⟩, ⟨4 * n - 1 - k, by omega⟩)
  let edges : Finset (Fin (2 * n)) := Finset.univ
  let c_edge (k : Fin (2 * n)) : (Fin n) × (Fin n) := (c (f k).1, c (f k).2)
  let G : Quiver (Fin n) := ⟨λ u v => {k // c_edge k = (u, v) ∨ c_edge k = (v, u)}⟩
  let d (i : Fin n) := (Finset.univ.filter (λ k => c (f k).1 = i)).card +
                      (Finset.univ.filter (λ k => c (f k).2 = i)).card
  have hd (i : Fin n) : d i = 4 := by
    have h1 : (Finset.univ.filter (λ j => c j = i)).card = 4 := h i
    have h2 : Finset.univ = (Finset.univ.map ⟨λ k => (f k).1, by intro x y h; simp [f] at h; exact h⟩) ∪
                            (Finset.univ.map ⟨λ k => (f k).2, by intro x y h; simp [f] at h; exact h⟩) := by
      ext j; simp [f]; omega
    have h3 : Disjoint (Finset.univ.map ⟨λ k => (f k).1, by intro x y h; simp [f] at h; exact h⟩)
                       (Finset.univ.map ⟨λ k => (f k).2, by intro x y h; simp [f] at h; exact h⟩) := by
      simp [f, disjoint_left]; intro k1 k2; omega
    rw [h2, filter_union, card_union_of_disjoint h3] at h1
    simp [d, h1]
  obtain ⟨o, ho⟩ := Prefunctor.exists_eulerian_orientation d hd
  let S_idx (k : Fin (2 * n)) : Fin (4 * n) := if o.1 k = c (f k).1 then (f k).1 else (f k).2
  let S : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) := pairs.image S_idx
  use S
  constructor
  · have h_sum : ∑ i : Fin (4 * n), ((i : ℕ) + 1) = 2 * n * (4 * n + 1) := by
      simp [univ_fin_succ, sum_range_id_succ]; omega
    have hS_card : S.card = 2 * n := by
      rw [card_image_of_injOn]; · simp
      · intro k1 k2 _ _ hS; simp [S_idx] at hS
        split_ifs at hS <;> simp [f] at hS <;> omega
    have hS_sum : ∑ i ∈ S, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = n * (4 * n + 1) := by
      rw [sum_image (by intro k1 k2 _ _ hS; simp [S_idx] at hS; split_ifs at hS <;> simp [f] at hS <;> omega)]
      have : ∀ k, ((S_idx k : ℕ) + 1) + (((f k).1 : ℕ) + ((f k).2 : ℕ) + 2 - ((S_idx k : ℕ) + 1)) = 4 * n + 1 := by
        intro k; simp [f]; omega
      let other (k : Fin (2 * n)) : Fin (4 * n) := if o.1 k = c (f k).1 then (f k).2 else (f k).1
      have h_other : ∀ k, (S_idx k : ℕ) + (other k : ℕ) + 2 = 4 * n + 1 := by intro k; simp [S_idx, other, f]; omega
      have h_total : ∑ k, ((S_idx k : ℕ) + (other k : ℕ) + 2) = 2 * n * (4 * n + 1) := by simp [h_other]
      have h_indices : ∑ k, ((S_idx k : ℕ) + 1) + ∑ k, ((other k : ℕ) + 1) = 2 * n * (4 * n + 1) := by
        rw [← sum_add_distrib]; simp [h_total, add_assoc]
      have h_eq : ∑ k, ((S_idx k : ℕ) + 1) = ∑ k, ((other k : ℕ) + 1) := by
        apply congr_arg; ext k; simp [S_idx, other, f]; split_ifs <;> omega
      omega
    rw [hS_sum, sum_compl, h_sum, hS_sum]; omega
  · intro i
    have : {j ∈ S | c j = i}.card = (Finset.univ.filter (λ k => c (S_idx k) = i)).card := by
      rw [← card_image_of_injOn, image_filter]
      · congr; ext k; simp [S_idx]
      · intro k1 k2 _ _ hS; simp [S_idx] at hS; split_ifs at hS <;> simp [f] at hS <;> omega
    rw [this]; exact ho i

let V := Fin n ⊕ Fin (4 * n)
  let pair (k : Fin (4 * n)) : Fin (4 * n) := ⟨4 * n - 1 - k.1, by omega⟩
  let G : SimpleGraph V := SimpleGraph.fromRel fun u v ↦
    (∃ k : Fin (4 * n), u = .inl (c k) ∧ v = .inr k) ∨
    (∃ k : Fin (4 * n), u = .inr k ∧ v = .inr (pair k))
  have deg_inl (i : Fin n) : G.degree (.inl i) = 4 := by
    rw [SimpleGraph.degree_fromRel_eq_card]
    have h_card := h i
    simp_rw [Set.ext_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h_card
    convert h_card
    ext x
    simp [pair]
    constructor
    · rintro (⟨k, rfl, rfl⟩ | ⟨k, rfl, h_contra⟩)
      · exact ⟨k, rfl, rfl⟩
      · simp [pair] at h_contra
    · rintro ⟨k, rfl, rfl⟩
      left; exact ⟨k, rfl, rfl⟩
  have deg_inr (k : Fin (4 * n)) : G.degree (.inr k) = 2 := by
    rw [SimpleGraph.degree_fromRel_eq_card]
    convert Fintype.card_fin 2
    ext x
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Finset.mem_univ, pair]
    constructor
    · rintro (⟨k', rfl, rfl⟩ | ⟨k', rfl, h_eq⟩)
      · exact Or.inl ⟨k', rfl, rfl⟩
      · exact Or.inr ⟨k', rfl, h_eq⟩
    · rintro (⟨k', h1, h2⟩ | ⟨k', h1, h2⟩)
      · left; use k'; simp_all
      · right; use k'; simp_all
  have : ∀ v, Even (G.degree v) := by
    rintro (i | k)
    · rw [deg_inl]; exact even_two_mul 2
    · rw [deg_inr]; exact even_two_mul 1
  obtain ⟨D, hD⟩ := EulerianOrientation.exists_euler_orientation G this
  let S : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) := {k | D.Rel (.inr k) (.inl (c k))}.toFinset
  use S
  constructor
  · have hS (k : Fin (4 * n)) : k ∈ S ↔ ¬ pair k ∈ S := by
      let e1 := (D.Rel (.inr k) (.inl (c k)))
      let e2 := (D.Rel (.inr k) (.inr (pair k)))
      have h_inr := hD (.inr k)
      rw [Orientation.indegree_eq_outdegree] at h_inr
      have h_deg := deg_inr k
      simp only [S, Set.toFinset_setOf, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and]
      have : G.Adj (.inr k) (.inl (c k)) := by left; use k
      have : G.Adj (.inr k) (.inr (pair k)) := by right; use k
      have := D.rel_or_rel_of_adj (.inr k) (.inl (c k)) this
      have := D.rel_or_rel_of_adj (.inr k) (.inr (pair k)) this
      have h_cases : (D.Rel (.inr k) (.inl (c k)) ∧ D.Rel (.inr (pair k)) (.inr k)) ∨
                     (D.Rel (.inl (c k)) (.inr k) ∧ D.Rel (.inr k) (.inr (pair k))) := by
        revert h_inr; rw [Orientation.indegree, Orientation.outdegree]
        simp only [SimpleGraph.degree_fromRel_eq_card, deg_inr, Finset.card_eq_two]
        intro h_eq
        obtain ⟨x, y, hxy, hall⟩ := Finset.card_eq_two.mp (SimpleGraph.neighborFinset_eq_filter G (.inr k))
        let f := fun z ↦ if D.Rel z (.inr k) then (1 : ℕ) else 0
        have : (∑ z ∈ G.neighborFinset (.inr k), f z) = 1 := by
          simp_all [f, Orientation.indegree]
        aesop
      obtain (⟨h1, h2⟩ | ⟨h1, h2⟩) := h_cases
      · simp [h1]; intro h_contra
        have h_pair := hD (.inr (pair k))
        simp [pair] at h_pair
        aesop
      · simp [h1]; have h_pair := hD (.inr (pair k)); aesop
    have h_sum : ∑ k, (k.1 + 1) = ∑ k ∈ S, (k.1 + 1) + ∑ k ∈ Sᶜ, (k.1 + 1) := Finset.sum_add_sum_compl S _
    have h_sym : ∑ k ∈ S, (4 * n - k.1) = ∑ k ∈ Sᶜ, (k.1 + 1) := by
      convert Finset.sum_bij (fun k _ ↦ pair k) (by simp [hS]) (by simp) (by simp [pair, Finset.mem_compl, hS]) (by simp [pair])
      · ext k; simp [pair]; omega
    have h_const : ∑ k ∈ S, (4 * n + 1) = (2 * n) * (4 * n + 1) := by
      rw [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_eq_two_mul_one_of_involution pair (by simp [pair])]
      · rfl
      · intro k; simp [pair]; omega
      · intro k; simp [hS]
    rw [← h_const]
    simp_rw [← add_assoc, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
    convert h_sym using 1
    · simp; ext k; omega
  · intro i
    rw [← Finset.card_setOf_mem_eq_filter, ← Set.toFinset_card]
    have := hD (.inl i)
    rw [Orientation.outdegree] at this
    convert this
    ext k
    simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.toFinset_setOf, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨rfl, hrel⟩; exact hrel
    · intro hrel; constructor
      · have h_adj : G.Adj (.inr k) (.inl i) := by left; use k
        exact (D.rel_or_rel_of_adj (.inr k) (.inl i) h_adj).resolve_left (D.not_rel_of_rel hrel)
      · exact hrel

end IMO2020P3

let P (k : Fin (2 * n)) : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) := {⟨k, by omega⟩, ⟨4 * n - 1 - k, by omega⟩}
  have hP : ∀ k, (P k).card = 2 := fun k => by rw [Finset.card_doubleton]; intro h; omega
  have hPD : Pairwise (Disjoint on P) := fun k l hkl => by
    rw [Finset.disjoint_left]; intro x hx; simp [P] at hx ⊢; rintro (rfl | rfl) <;> rintro (rfl | rfl) <;> omega
  have hPU : (Finset.univ.biUnion P) = Finset.univ := by
    ext x; simp [P]; refine ⟨fun _ => Finset.mem_univ _, fun _ => ?_⟩
    use (if x.1 < 2 * n then ⟨x.1, by omega⟩ else ⟨4 * n - 1 - x.1, by omega⟩)
    split_ifs <;> (intro h; try omega); left; exact Fin.ext (by dsimp; omega)
    right; exact Fin.ext (by dsimp; omega)
  let edges : Multiset (Sym2 (Fin n)) := (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin (2 * n))).val.map (fun k => Sym2.mk (c ⟨k, by omega⟩, c ⟨4 * n - 1 - k, by omega⟩))
  have hdeg : ∀ i : Fin n, (edges.filter (i ∈ ·)).card = 4 := by
    intro i
    have : (edges.filter (i ∈ ·)).card = #{j | c j = i} := by
      simp only [edges, Multiset.map_filter, Multiset.card_map, Sym2.mem_iff, Finset.filter_val]
      let f : {j | c j = i} ≃ {k : Fin (2 * n) | i = c ⟨k, by omega⟩ ∨ i = c ⟨4 * n - 1 - k, by omega⟩} := {
        toFun := fun ⟨j, hj⟩ => ⟨if j < 2 * n then ⟨j, by omega⟩ else ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩, by
          split_ifs <;> (rw [hj] at *; simp)⟩
        invFun := fun ⟨k, hk⟩ => if c ⟨k, by omega⟩ = i then ⟨⟨k, by omega⟩, by simp_all⟩ else ⟨⟨4 * n - 1 - k, by omega⟩, by
          simp at hk; simp_all⟩
        left_inv := fun ⟨j, hj⟩ => by dsimp; split_ifs <;> apply Subtype.ext <;> (dsimp; omega)
        right_inv := fun ⟨k, hk⟩ => by dsimp; split_ifs <;> apply Subtype.ext <;> (dsimp; omega)
      }
      rw [← h i, Fintype.card_subtype, Fintype.card_subtype, ← f.card_eq]; rfl
    rw [this, h i]
  obtain ⟨J, hJ⟩ := edges.exists_two_factor hdeg
  let S := (J.map (fun e => (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin (2 * n))).filter (fun k => Sym2.mk (c ⟨k, by omega⟩, c ⟨4 * n - 1 - k, by omega⟩) = e))).flatten.biUnion P
  use S
  have hScard : ∀ i, #{j ∈ S | c j = i} = 2 := by
    intro i; simp [S, P]; rw [← hJ i]; congr; ext e; simp; constructor
    · rintro ⟨k, hk, rfl, (h1 | h2)⟩ <;> [rw [h1]; rw [h2]] <;> simp
    · rintro (h1 | h2) <;> obtain ⟨k, hk, rfl⟩ := J.mem_iff.1 (Multiset.mem_of_mem_filter _ (by simp [h1, h2]))
      · exact ⟨k, hk, rfl, Or.inl h1⟩
      · exact ⟨k, hk, rfl, Or.inr h2⟩
  refine ⟨?_, hScard⟩
  have hSsum : ∑ i ∈ S, (i.1 + 1) = n * (4 * n + 1) := by
    rw [Finset.sum_biUnion (by intro k hk l hl hkl; exact hPD hkl)]; simp [P]
    have hJcard : J.card = n := by
      have := Multiset.sum_filter_mem_card J; simp [hJ] at this; exact this
    rw [← hJcard, ← Finset.sum_const, Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun k _ => by omega)]
  have hTotal : ∑ i : Fin (4 * n), (i.1 + 1) = 2 * n * (4 * n + 1) := by
    simp [Finset.sum_range_id (4 * n), ← Nat.mul_assoc]; omega
  rw [hSsum, ← Finset.sum_add_sum_compl S, hTotal]; omega

let P (k : Fin (2 * n)) : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) := {⟨2 * k, by omega⟩, ⟨2 * k + 1, by omega⟩}
  let V := {S : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) | (∀ i, #{j ∈ S | c j = i} = 2) ∧ (∀ k, (S ∩ P k).card = 1)}
  let f (S : Finset (Fin (4 * n))) := ∑ i ∈ S, ((i : ℕ) + 1)
  have hV : V.Nonempty := by
    let E : MultiGraph (Fin n) (Fin (2 * n)) := {
      V := Fin n, E := Fin (2 * n),
      surj := λ k => {c ⟨2 * k, by omega⟩, c ⟨2 * k + 1, by omega⟩},
      multiplicity := λ i j => #{k | {c ⟨2 * k, by omega⟩, c ⟨2 * k + 1, by omega⟩} = {i, j}}
    }
    have hdeg : ∀ i, (List.map (λ k => (E.surj k)) (List.finRange (2 * n))).count i = 4 := by
      intro i
      have h4 := h i
      sorry
    sorry
  let S0 := Classical.choose hV
  have hS0 := Classical.choose_spec hV
  let f_val (S : Finset (Fin (4 * n))) := (f S : ℤ) - n * (4 * n + 1)
  have : ∃ S ∈ V, f_val S = 0 := by
    sorry
  obtain ⟨S, hS, hS_sum⟩ := this
  refine ⟨S, ?_, hS.1⟩
  rw [← sub_eq_zero, ← Int.ofNat_inj] at hS_sum ⊢
  have h_total : ∑ i : Fin (4 * n), ((i : ℕ) + 1) = 2 * n * (4 * n + 1) := by
    rw [Finset.sum_range_reflect (λ i => i + 1) (4 * n)]
    norm_cast
    simp only [Fin.coe_eq_castSucc, Finset.sum_fin_eq_sum_range, Finset.sum_range_id__add_1]
    omega
  have : (∑ i ∈ S, ((i : ℕ) + 1) : ℤ) = (∑ i ∈ Sᶜ, ((i : ℕ) + 1) : ℤ) ↔ 2 * (∑ i ∈ S, ((i : ℕ) + 1) : ℤ) = 2 * n * (4 * n + 1) := by
    nth_rewrite 2 [← h_total]
    rw [Finset.sum_add_sum_compl]
    omega
  exact this.mp (by omega)

let pairs : Finset (Fin (2 * n)) := Finset.univ
  let value_pairs (k : Fin (2 * n)) : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) := {⟨2 * k, by omega⟩, ⟨2 * k + 1, by omega⟩}
  let color_pebbles (i : Fin n) : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) := {j | c j = i}.toFinset
  have h_cp (i : Fin n) : (color_pebbles i).card = 4 := by simpa [color_pebbles] using h i
  let G : SimpleGraph (Fin (2 * n)) := SimpleGraph.fromRel fun a b => ∃ i, (value_pairs a ∩ color_pebbles i).Nonempty ∧ (value_pairs b ∩ color_pebbles i).Nonempty
  let choice_S (f : Fin (2 * n) → ℕ) : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) :=
    Finset.univ.biUnion (fun k => if f k = 0 then {⟨2 * k, by omega⟩} else {⟨2 * k + 1, by omega⟩})
  sorry

let pairs (i : Fin (2 * n)) : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) := {⟨i, by omega⟩, ⟨4 * n - 1 - i.val, by omega⟩}
  let c_pairs (i : Fin (2 * n)) : Fin n × Fin n := (c ⟨i, by omega⟩, c ⟨4 * n - 1 - i.val, by omega⟩)
  have : ∃ I : Finset (Fin (2 * n)), I.card = n ∧ ∀ i : Fin n, (I.filter (fun k => (c_pairs k).1 = i)).card + (I.filter (fun k => (c_pairs k).2 = i)).card = 2 := by
    let edges : Multiset (Fin n × Fin n) := Multiset.ofList (List.range (2 * n) |>.map (fun i => c_pairs ⟨i, by omega⟩))
    let G : Sym2 (Fin n) → ℕ := fun p => edges.count (p.out.1, p.out.2) + edges.count (p.out.2, p.out.1)
    have : ∀ i, (Multiset.ofList (List.range (2 * n) |>.map (fun k => c_pairs ⟨k, by omega⟩))).countP (fun p => p.1 = i) + (Multiset.ofList (List.range (2 * n) |>.map (fun k => c_pairs ⟨k, by omega⟩))).countP (fun p => p.2 = i) = 4 := by
      intro i
      simp [c_pairs, h i]
      let s1 := Finset.univ.filter (fun k : Fin (2 * n) => c ⟨k, by omega⟩ = i)
      let s2 := Finset.univ.filter (fun k : Fin (2 * n) => c ⟨4 * n - 1 - k, by omega⟩ = i)
      have h_sum : s1.card + s2.card = 4 := by
        have h_disj : Disjoint (s1.map ⟨fun k => (k : ℕ), Fin.val_injective⟩) (s2.map ⟨fun k => 4 * n - 1 - k, by
          intro x y hxy; simp at hxy; omega⟩) := by
          simp [Disjoint, Finset.inf_eq_inter, Finset.subset_empty_iff, Finset.ext_iff]
          intro x hx1 hx2; omega
        rw [← Finset.card_union_of_disjoint h_disj]
        convert h i
        ext x; simp; constructor
        · intro hx; cases hx <;> simp [*]; omega
        · intro hx; by_cases h_lt : (x : ℕ) < 2 * n
          · left; use ⟨x, h_lt⟩; simp [*]
          · right; use ⟨4 * n - 1 - x, by omega⟩; simp; omega
      exact h_sum
    obtain ⟨I, hI_card, hI_count⟩ := exists_subset_card_n_sum_eq_n_4n_plus_1 n c h
    exact ⟨I, hI_card, hI_count⟩
  obtain ⟨I, hI1, hI2⟩ := this
  let S := I.biUnion pairs
  use S
  constructor
  · have hS_card : S.card = 2 * n := by
      rw [Finset.card_biUnion]
      · simp [hI1]
      · intro x hx y hy hxy
        simp [pairs, Finset.disjoint_iff_ne]
        intro a ha b hb
        apply Fin.val_injective
        simp at ha hb; cases ha <;> cases hb <;> omega
    have hS_sum : ∑ i ∈ S, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = n * (4 * n + 1) := by
      rw [Finset.sum_biUnion]
      · rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun x _ => (by simp [pairs] : ∑ i ∈ pairs x, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = 4 * n + 1))]
        simp [hI1]
      · intro x hx y hy hxy
        simp [pairs, Finset.disjoint_iff_ne]
        intro a ha b hb
        apply Fin.val_injective
        simp at ha hb; cases ha <;> cases hb <;> omega
    have h_total : ∑ i : Fin (4 * n), ((i : ℕ) + 1) = 2 * n * (4 * n + 1) := by
      rw [← Nat.choose_two_right, Nat.sum_range_id]
      simp; omega
    rw [hS_sum, ← Finset.sum_add_sum_compl S, hS_sum] at h_total
    omega
  · intro i
    rw [Finset.filter_biUnion, Finset.card_biUnion]
    · convert hI2 i
      · simp [pairs, c_pairs]
        intro k hk
        let s := (pairs k).filter (fun j => c j = i)
        have : s.card = (if c ⟨k, by omega⟩ = i then 1 else 0) + (if c ⟨4 * n - 1 - k, by omega⟩ = i then 1 else 0) := by
          simp [s, pairs]; split_ifs <;> simp [*]
        exact this
    · intro x hx y hy hxy
      simp [pairs, Finset.disjoint_iff_ne]
      intro a ha b hb
      apply Fin.val_injective
      simp at ha hb; cases ha <;> cases hb <;> omega
where exists_subset_card_n_sum_eq_n_4n_plus_1 (n : ℕ) (c : Fin (4 * n) → Fin n) (h : ∀ i, #{j | c j = i} = 4) :
    ∃ I : Finset (Fin (2 * n)), I.card = n ∧ ∀ i : Fin n, (I.filter (fun k => c ⟨k, by omega⟩ = i)).card + (I.filter (fun k => c ⟨4 * n - 1 - k.val, by omega⟩ = i)).card = 2 := sorry

let V := Fin n
  let E := Fin (2 * n)
  let f : E → V × V := λ k ↦ (c ⟨2 * k.1, by omega⟩, c ⟨2 * k.1 + 1, by omega⟩)
  let G : MultiGraph V E := { s := λ k ↦ (f k).1, t := λ k ↦ (f k).2 }
  have h_deg : ∀ v : V, G.degree v = 4 := by
    intro v
    have : #{j | c j = v} = 4 := h v
    let s1 : Finset E := {k | c ⟨2 * k.1, by omega⟩ = v}
    let s2 : Finset E := {k | c ⟨2 * k.1 + 1, by omega⟩ = v}
    have h_union : #{j | c j = v} = (s1.map ⟨λ k ↦ 2 * k.1, by omega⟩ ∪ s2.map ⟨λ k ↦ 2 * k.1 + 1, by omega⟩).card := by rfl
    have h_disj : Disjoint (s1.map ⟨λ k ↦ 2 * k.1, by omega⟩) (s2.map ⟨λ k ↦ 2 * k.1 + 1, by omega⟩) := by
      rw [Finset.disjoint_left]; intro x hx1 hx2
      simp at hx1 hx2; omega
    rw [h_union, Finset.card_union_of_disjoint h_disj, Finset.card_map, Finset.card_map] at this
    exact this
  obtain ⟨o, ho⟩ := G.exists_eulerian_orientation h_deg
  let S_idx : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) := Finset.univ.filter (λ i ↦
    if h : i.1 % 2 = 0 then o ⟨i.1 / 2, by omega⟩ = (i, ⟨i.1 + 1, by omega⟩)
    else o ⟨i.1 / 2, by omega⟩ = (i, ⟨i.1 - 1, by omega⟩))
  use S_idx
  constructor
  · have h_sum : ∑ i ∈ S_idx, ((i : ℕ) + 1) + ∑ i ∈ S_idxᶜ, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = (2 * n) * (4 * n + 1) := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_compl S_idx), Finset.filter_union_filter_neg_eq]
      simp [Nat.sum_range_id]; omega
    have h_card : ∀ k : E, (S_idx ∩ {⟨2 * k.1, by omega⟩, ⟨2 * k.1 + 1, by omega⟩}).card = 1 := by
      intro k; simp [S_idx]; split_ifs <;> simp [*]
    have h_diff : ∑ i ∈ S_idx, ((i : ℕ) + 1) - ∑ i ∈ S_idxᶜ, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = 0 := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_add_sum_compl S_idx (λ i ↦ (i : ℤ) + 1)]
      simp [S_idx]; sorry
    omega
  · intro v
    have : #{j ∈ S_idx | c j = v} = G.outDegree o v := by
      rw [G.outDegree_eq_card_filter_outEdges, outEdges]; congr
      ext k; simp [S_idx]; split_ifs <;> simp [G, *]
    rw [this, ho]; exact rfl

let pairs : Finset (Fin (2 * n)) := Finset.univ
  let f (j : Fin (2 * n)) : Fin (4 * n) := ⟨j, by omega⟩
  let g (j : Fin (2 * n)) : Fin (4 * n) := ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩
  let edges := pairs.attach.map ⟨fun j => (c (f j), c (g j)), fun _ _ h => Fin.val_inj.mp (by injection h)⟩
  let V := Fin n
  let deg (v : V) := (pairs.filter (fun j => c (f j) = v)).card + (pairs.filter (fun j => c (g j) = v)).card
  have h_deg : ∀ v, deg v = 4 := by
    intro v
    have : {j | c j = v}.card = 4 := h v
    have : (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin (4 * n))).filter (fun j => c j = v) = {j | c j = v}.toFinset := by
      ext; simp
    rw [← this, ← card_univ, ← Finset.sum_card, ← Finset.card_range (4 * n)]
    let s1 := pairs.filter (fun j => c (f j) = v)
    let s2 := pairs.filter (fun j => c (g j) = v)
    have h_disj : Disjoint (s1.map ⟨f, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩) (s2.map ⟨g, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩) := by
      apply Finset.disjoint_left.mpr
      intro x hx hx'
      simp at hx hx'
      omega
    have h_union : (s1.map ⟨f, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩) ∪ (s2.map ⟨g, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩) = (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin (4 * n))).filter (fun j => c j = v) := by
      ext x
      simp [f, g]
      constructor
      · rintro (⟨j, hj, rfl⟩ | ⟨j, hj, rfl⟩) <;> assumption
      · intro hx
        if h : x.val < 2 * n then left else right
        · use ⟨x.val, by omega⟩; simp [h]; exact hx
        · use ⟨4 * n - 1 - x.val, by omega⟩; simp [h]; rw [hx]; rfl
    rw [← h_union, card_disjoint_union h_disj, card_map, card_map]
    exact rfl
  obtain ⟨E, hE⟩ : ∃ E : Finset (Fin (2 * n)), E.card = n ∧ ∀ v, (E.filter (fun j => c (f j) = v)).card + (E.filter (fun j => c (g j) = v)).card = 2 := by
    let G : preconnectedGraph V := multigraph.from_pairs (fun j => (c (f j), c (g j)))
    -- Using the standard fact that every 4-regular multigraph has a 2-factor
    -- In this case, since we pick n edges, the sum of their degrees is 2n, so the average degree is 2.
    -- The property of being a 2-factor gives exactly degree 2 for each vertex.
    sorry
  let S := E.map ⟨f, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩ ∪ E.map ⟨g, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩
  use S
  constructor
  · have h_disj : Disjoint (E.map ⟨f, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩) (E.map ⟨g, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩) := by
      apply Finset.disjoint_left.mpr
      intro x hx hx'
      simp at hx hx'; omega
    have h_sum (A : Finset (Fin (2 * n))) : ∑ i ∈ A.map ⟨f, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩ ∪ A.map ⟨g, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = A.card * (4 * n + 1) := by
      rw [sum_union h_disj, sum_map, sum_map]
      simp [f, g]
      rw [← sum_add_distrib]
      apply sum_congr rfl
      intro j _
      omega
    have hS_sum := h_sum E
    have hSc_sum : ∑ i ∈ Sᶜ, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = (Eᶜ).card * (4 * n + 1) := by
      have h_union : Sᶜ = (Eᶜ).map ⟨f, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩ ∪ (Eᶜ).map ⟨g, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩ := by
        ext x; simp [S, f, g]; omega
      rw [h_union, h_sum Eᶜ]
    rw [hS_sum, hSc_sum, hE.1]
    have : (Eᶜ).card = n := by rw [card_compl, card_univ, card_range, hE.1]; omega
    rw [this]
  · intro i
    have : {j ∈ S | c j = i} = (E.filter (fun j => c (f j) = i)).map ⟨f, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩ ∪ (E.filter (fun j => c (g j) = i)).map ⟨g, fun _ _ => Fin.val_inj.mp⟩ := by
      ext x; simp [S, f, g]; constructor <;> intro hx <;> (try rintro ⟨j, hj, rfl⟩) <;> aesop
    rw [this, card_disjoint_union, card_map, card_map]
    · exact hE.2 i
    · apply Finset.disjoint_left.mpr; intro x hx hx'; simp at hx hx'; omega

let pairs : Finset (Finset (Fin (4 * n))) := (range (2 * n)).image (λ j ↦ {⟨j, by omega⟩, ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩})
  let a (i : Fin n) (p : Finset (Fin (4 * n))) := (p.filter (λ j ↦ c j = i)).card
  have ha1 : ∀ p ∈ pairs, ∑ i, a i p = 2 := λ p hp ↦ by
    obtain ⟨j, _, rfl⟩ := mem_image.1 hp
    simp [a, (by omega : j ≠ 4 * n - 1 - j), Finset.filter_insert]
  have ha2 : ∀ i, ∑ p ∈ pairs, a i p = 4 := λ i ↦ by
    simp_rw [a, ← card_biUnion (λ _ _ _ _ hne ↦ hne), ← filter_biUnion, biUnion_image, (λ _ ↦ id), univ_range_2n_biUnion_pairs, h i]
  obtain ⟨S_pairs, hS_pairs⟩ := ∃_subset_sum_eq_of_forall_sum_eq pairs (λ p ↦ 2) (λ i ↦ (a i ·)) 2 (by simp [ha1]) (by simp [ha2])
  let S := S_pairs.biUnion id
  use S
  have hS_card_color : ∀ i, (S.filter (λ j ↦ c j = i)).card = 2 := λ i ↦ by
    simp_rw [S, filter_biUnion, card_biUnion (λ _ _ _ _ hne ↦ hne), hS_pairs.2 i]
  refine ⟨?_, hS_card_color⟩
  have hS_sum : ∑ i ∈ S, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = S_pairs.card * (4 * n + 1) := by
    simp_rw [S, sum_biUnion (λ _ _ _ _ hne ↦ hne), sum_pair_sum_4n_plus_1 S_pairs]
  have hSc_sum : ∑ i ∈ Sᶜ, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = (pairs.card - S_pairs.card) * (4 * n + 1) := by
    simp_rw [← sum_pair_sum_4n_plus_1 pairs, ← hS_sum, sum_compl_add_sum, sum_pair_sum_4n_plus_1 pairs]
  rw [hS_sum, hSc_sum, (by simp [ha2, ha1] : S_pairs.card = n), (by simp [pairs] : pairs.card = 2 * n)]
  omega
where
  sum_pair_sum_4n_plus_1 (ps : Finset (Finset (Fin (4 * n)))) :
      ∑ p ∈ ps, ∑ i ∈ p, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = ps.card * (4 * n + 1) :=
    sum_congr rfl (λ p hp ↦ by
      obtain ⟨j, _, rfl⟩ := mem_image.1 (mem_of_subset (by assumption) hp)
      simp [sum_pair, (by omega : j ≠ 4 * n - 1 - j)])
  univ_range_2n_biUnion_pairs : (range (2 * n)).biUnion (λ j ↦ {⟨j, by omega⟩, ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩}) = univ := by
    ext x; simp only [mem_biUnion, mem_range, mem_insert, mem_singleton, mem_univ, iff_true]
    by_cases hx : (x : ℕ) < 2 * n
    · exact ⟨⟨x, by omega⟩, hx, Or.inl (by ext; simp)⟩
    · exact ⟨⟨4 * n - 1 - x, by omega⟩, (by omega), Or.inr (by ext; simp)⟩
  ∃_subset_sum_eq_of_forall_sum_eq {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [DecidableEq α] (P : Finset β) (f : β → ℕ) (g : α → β → ℕ) (k : ℕ) (hf : ∀ p ∈ P, ∑ i, g i p = f p) (hg : ∀ i, ∑ p ∈ P, g i p = 2 * k) : ∃ S ⊆ P, (∀ i, ∑ p ∈ S, g i p = k) := by
    let G : Multigraph α := Multigraph.of_edges (P.val.biUnion (λ p ↦ (Multigraph.of_regular_edges (g · p)).val))
    obtain ⟨F, hF⟩ := G.exists_two_factor_of_four_regular (by sorry)
    sorry -- The 2-factor theorem implementation for multigraphs

let pairs : Fin (2 * n) → Finset (Fin (4 * n)) := fun k =>
    {⟨k, by omega⟩, ⟨4 * n - 1 - k, by omega⟩}
  have hP_card : ∀ k, (pairs k).card = 2 := fun k =>
    by rw [Finset.card_doubleton]; intro h; omega
  have hP_disj : ∀ k₁ k₂, k₁ ≠ k₂ → Disjoint (pairs k₁) (pairs k₂) := by
    intro k₁ k₂ hne; rw [Finset.disjoint_left]; intro x hx;
    simp [pairs] at hx; cases' hx with hx hx <;>
    simp [pairs, hx]; intro h; cases' h with h h <;> omega
  have hP_univ : (Finset.univ.biUnion pairs) = Finset.univ := by
    apply Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le
    · intro x _; simp
    · rw [Finset.card_biUnion hP_disj]
      simp [hP_card, Finset.card_univ]
  let G : SimpleGraph (Fin (2 * n)) := SimpleGraph.fromRel fun k₁ k₂ =>
    ∃ i : Fin n, ∃ x ∈ pairs k₁, ∃ y ∈ pairs k₂, k₁ ≠ k₂ ∧ c x = i ∧ c y = i
  have : ∃ K : Finset (Fin (2 * n)), K.card = n ∧
      ∀ i, ((K.biUnion pairs).filter (fun j => c j = i)).card = 2 := by
    let edges : Finset (Fin n × Fin (2 * n) × Fin (2 * n)) :=
      univ.biUnion fun i =>
        let s := (univ.filter (fun k => ∃ x ∈ pairs k, c x = i))
        if h : s.card = 2 then
          let k1 := s.min'.1
          let k2 := s.max'.1
          {(i, k1, k2)}
        else if h : s.card = 1 then
          let k := s.min'.1
          {(i, k, k)}
        else ∅
    sorry
  obtain ⟨K, hK_card, hK_color⟩ := this
  refine ⟨K.biUnion pairs, ?_, hK_color⟩
  rw [Finset.compl_biUnion hP_univ hP_disj]
  have h_sum (L : Finset (Fin (2 * n))) :
      ∑ i ∈ L.biUnion pairs, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = L.card * (4 * n + 1) := by
    rw [Finset.sum_biUnion hP_disj]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro k _
    simp [pairs, add_assoc]
    omega
  rw [h_sum, h_sum Kᶜ, Finset.card_compl, hK_card]
  simp [mul_comm]

let pairs (j : Fin (2 * n)) : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) := {⟨j, by omega⟩, ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩}
  have hsum (j : Fin (2 * n)) : ∑ k ∈ pairs j, ((k : ℕ) + 1) = 4 * n + 1 := by
    have hjk : (⟨j, by omega⟩ : Fin (4 * n)) ≠ ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩ := by
      apply Fin.ne_of_val_ne; omega
    simp [pairs, hjk, Fin.coe_fin_one]; omega
  let edges : Multiset (Sym2 (Fin n)) := (Multiset.range (2 * n)).map (fun j => s(c ⟨j, by omega⟩, c ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩))
  have hdeg (i : Fin n) : (edges.filter (i ∈ ·)).card = 4 := by
    simp only [edges, Multiset.card_filter, Multiset.map_range, Multiset.count_map, Sym2.mem_iff,
      Multiset.card_range, Multiset.count_range, ite_true]
    let f (k : Fin (4 * n)) : Bool := c k = i
    have : ∑ k, (if f k then 1 else 0) = 4 := by
      simpa [f] using h i
    rw [← this, (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin (4 * n))).sum_pair_replacing_index (fun k => 4 * n - 1 - k) (by simp; omega) (by intro k; omega)]
    simp [f]; rfl
  obtain ⟨S₀, hS₀⟩ : ∃ S₀ : Multiset (Sym2 (Fin n)), S₀ ≤ edges ∧ ∀ i, (S₀.filter (i ∈ ·)).card = 2 := by
    let G : ReprGraph (Fin n) := {
      support := Finset.univ,
      adj := fun i j => (edges.filter (· = s(i, j))).card,
      symm := fun i j => by simp [Sym2.eq_swap]
    }
    have hG : ∀ i, (Finset.univ.sum (fun j => G.adj i j) + G.adj i i) = 4 := by
      intro i; simp [G, ← Multiset.card_filter]; rw [hdeg i]; exact (Multiset.filter_mem_stats edges i).symm
    obtain ⟨S₀', hS₀'⟩ := G.exists_two_factor (fun i => by rw [hG i]; omega)
    refine ⟨S₀', ?_, fun i => by simpa using hS₀' i⟩
    intro e; rw [Multiset.le_iff_count]; intro he; simp [G] at *; exact he
  let S_idx := (Multiset.range (2 * n)).subly (fun j => s(c ⟨j, by omega⟩, c ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩)) S₀
  let S := S_idx.toFinset.biUnion pairs
  refine ⟨S, ?_, ?_⟩
  · have h_card : S_idx.card = n := by
      have := Multiset.sum_card_filter_mem S₀ (fun i => (S₀.filter (i ∈ ·)).card) (by simp [hS₀])
      simpa [hS₀] using this
    have h_sum_S : ∑ i ∈ S, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = n * (4 * n + 1) := by
      rw [Finset.sum_biUnion]; swap
      · intro i hi j hj hij; apply Finset.disjoint_left.mpr; intro x hx; simp [pairs] at *
        cases hx <;> subst x <;> omega
      rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun j _ => hsum j), Finset.sum_const, h_card]; rfl
    have h_total : ∑ i, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = 2 * n * (4 * n + 1) := by
      simp [Finset.sum_range_id]; omega
    rw [h_sum_S, ← compl_union_self S, Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_compl_left S), h_sum_S] at h_total
    omega
  · intro i; simp [S, hS₀]; rw [Finset.card_filter_biUnion]; swap
    · intro j hj k hk hjk; apply Finset.disjoint_left.mpr; intro x hx; simp [pairs] at *
      cases hx <;> subst x <;> omega
    have : ∀ j, #{k ∈ pairs j | c k = i} = (if c ⟨j, by omega⟩ = i then 1 else 0) + (if c ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩ = i then 1 else 0) := by
      intro j; have hjk : (⟨j, by omega⟩ : Fin (4 * n)) ≠ ⟨4 * n - 1 - j, by omega⟩ := by apply Fin.ne_of_val_ne; omega
      simp [pairs, hjk]; split_ifs <;> simp [*]
    simp [this, ← Multiset.card_filter]; exact hS₀ i

let g1 (i : Fin (4 * n)) : Fin (4 * n) := ⟨4 * n - 1 - i.1, by omega⟩
  have h1 i : g1 (g1 i) = i := by ext; simp [g1]; omega
  have h1' i : g1 i ≠ i := by intro h; apply_fun (·.1) at h; simp [g1] at h; omega

    rw [SimpleGraph.isBipartite_iff_no_odd_cycle]
    intro ⟨l, hl⟩; apply even_iff_not_odd.1; rw [← Nat.mod_two_ne_zero, ← Nat.even_iff_not_odd]

      have := hl.adj (k % l.length); simp [G] at this; exact this.2

      -- Cycles in a union of two matchings must be even because they must alternate.

    simp [h_odd]

      intro j; constructor <;> intro h

      -- Each color is partitioned into two g2-pairs, one in S1 and one in S2.
      sorry
    exact h_S1_color

let P (j : Fin (2 * n)) : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) := {j.castLE (by omega), (Fin.Nat.rev (4 * n - 1) (j.castLE (by omega)))}
  have hP_sum (j : Fin (2 * n)) : ∑ i ∈ P j, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = 4 * n + 1 := by
    have hj : (j.castLE (by omega) : ℕ) < 2 * n := j.2
    have hrev : (Fin.Nat.rev (4 * n - 1) (j.castLE (by omega)) : ℕ) = 4 * n - 1 - j := by
      simp [Fin.Nat.rev, hj, (by omega : 4 * n - 1 - j < 4 * n)]
    have hne : j.castLE (by omega) ≠ Fin.Nat.rev (4 * n - 1) (j.castLE (by omega)) := by
      apply Fin.ne_of_val_ne; omega
    simp [P, hne, hrev]; omega
  let G : Multigraph (Fin n) := Multigraph.ofFin (2 * n) (fun j => (c (j.castLE (by omega)), c (Fin.Nat.rev (4 * n - 1) (j.castLE (by omega)))))
  have hdeg (i : Fin n) : G.degree i = 4 := by
    simp [G, Multigraph.degree, Multigraph.ofFin, Multigraph.count, Multigraph.edges, ← Finset.card_univ, Finset.filter_filter]
    let f (j : Fin (4 * n)) : Fin (2 * n) × Bool := ⟨if h : j < 2 * n then ⟨j, h⟩ else ⟨Fin.Nat.rev (4 * n - 1) j, by
      have hj := j.2; dsimp [Fin.Nat.rev] at *; omega⟩, j < 2 * n⟩
    have hf : Function.Bijective f := by
      refine ⟨fun x y hxy => ?_, fun ⟨j, b⟩ => ?_⟩
      · dsimp [f] at hxy; split_ifs at hxy <;> injection hxy <;> try { apply Fin.ne_of_val_ne; dsimp [Fin.Nat.rev] at *; omega }
        · apply Fin.eq_of_val_eq; injection hxy
        · apply Fin.eq_of_val_eq; dsimp [Fin.Nat.rev] at *; omega
      · cases b <;> dsimp [f]
        · use Fin.Nat.rev (4 * n - 1) (j.castLE (by omega)); split_ifs; · omega · simp
        · use j.castLE (by omega); split_ifs; · simp · omega
    rw [← Finset.card_bij f (fun j _ => Finset.mem_univ _) (fun _ _ _ _ h => h) (fun x _ => ⟨f.symm x, Finset.mem_univ _, f.right_inv x⟩)]
    congr; ext j; simp [f]; split_ifs <;> dsimp [Fin.Nat.rev] at * <;> simp [h, (by omega : ¬ (4 * n - 1 - j < 2 * n))]
  obtain ⟨E, hE⟩ := G.exists_two_regular_subgraph_of_even_regular hdeg 2 (by omega)
  refine ⟨E.bind P, ?_, ?_⟩
  · have h_disj (j k : Fin (2 * n)) (hjk : j ≠ k) : Disjoint (P j) (P k) := by
      apply Finset.disjoint_left.mpr; intro x hx hy
      simp [P] at hx hy; dsimp [Fin.Nat.rev] at *; cases hx <;> cases hy <;> apply Fin.ne_of_val_ne at hjk <;> omega
    rw [Finset.sum_bind h_disj, Finset.sum_compl, hE.card_eq, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
    · have h_all_sum : ∑ i : Fin (4 * n), ((i : ℕ) + 1) = 2 * n * (4 * n + 1) := by
        rw [← Finset.sum_range_succ, Nat.sum_range_id]; omega
      rw [h_all_sum]; omega
    · intro j hj; apply hP_sum
  · intro i; rw [← hE.degree_eq i, Multigraph.degree, ← Finset.card_univ, Finset.filter_filter]
    have h_disj (j k : Fin (2 * n)) (hjk : j ≠ k) : Disjoint {x ∈ P j | c x = i} {x ∈ P k | c x = i} := by
      apply Finset.disjoint_left.mpr; intro x hx hy; apply Finset.disjoint_left.mp (h_disj j k hjk) hx.1 hy.1
    rw [Finset.bind_filter, Finset.card_bind h_disj]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro j hj; simp [P]; split_ifs with h1 h2 h3 <;> simp [h1, h2, h3]
    · apply Fin.ne_of_val_ne at h1; omega

  sorry

      intro S' hj; apply (mul_right_inj' (by omega : 2 ≠ 0)).mp; rw [mul_add, ← add_assoc, add_left_comm, ← add_assoc, ← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_compl S'), Finset.union_compl, Finset.sum_add_distrib]
